entry.title: Creating an Email Destination in SAP Build Process Automation: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
Step 1: Navigate to Your BPA Tenant

Log in to your SAP BPA environment. Ensure you have the appropriate permissions to manage destinations.

Step 2: Open Control Tower

From the main menu, navigate to the Control Tower. 

Step 3: Click on Destinations

In the Control Tower, find and click on Destinations. This section allows you to manage various types of destinations.

Step 4: Click Open BTP Cockpit

To create a new destination, click on the Open BTP Cockpit button. This will redirect you to the SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) Cockpit.

Step 5: Create Destination

  1. In the BTP Cockpit, click on Create Destination.
  2. Enter the details for your new email destination:

    Additional properties

    mail.smtp.from : <your email id>
    mail.transport.protocol=smtp
    mail.smtp.host=smtp.gmail.com
    mail.smtp.starttls.enable=true
    mail.smtp.starttls.required=true
    mail.smtp.port=587
    mail.smtp.auth=true

     
    • Name: sap_process_automation_mail (keep the name exactly in this format)
    • Type: Select Mail from the dropdown menu.
    • Description: Optionally, add a brief description.
    • Proxy Type: Select the appropriate proxy type (usually "Internet").
    • Authentication: Choose Basic Authentication.
    • User: Enter your email address.
    • Password: Enter the app password generated for your email account (details below)

Creating an App Password for Gmail

If you are using a Gmail account, you need to create an app password instead of using your regular email password. Follow these steps to generate an app password:

  1. Go to your Gmail account and click on Manage Your Google Account.
  2. Navigate to the Security section.
  3. Under How you sign in to Google, click on 2-Step Verification.
  4. Click on App Passwords.
  5. Give an App name. 
  6. Click Create. A password will be generated on your screen.
  7. Copy the generated password and use it in the Password section when configuring the email destination.

Step 6: Save the Destination

Once you have entered all the required details, click Save to create the destination. 

Now that you have created the email destination, you can use it in your workflows to send automated emails.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Event Mesh or APIM when to use what?
entry.content:
hi dop,

Thank you for your response! In our landscape we are using other APIM tools(like Apigee,Kong gateway etc.,) for API interfaces and SAP Advanced Event Mesh topics are driven by us. Could you please let me know factors that should be considered for choosing Advanced Event Mesh? Should we refer ISA-M offered by SAP before we decide which integration pattern to choose for what use case? Thank you!

many thx for work. I need some lession concerning about the theme.

There is no packing specification because each HU can have a different quantity of the article. I'll be honest, I was supposed to set it up for a customer this year and failed

entry.title: Why does the system accept Order Number which is out of range defined in KONK?
entry.content:
Why does the system accept Order Number which is out of range defined in KONK?

Eg. I create in KO01 new Order: RMTESTTEST (10 characters and more) and it is acceptable by the system. While the number range in KONK for this type of orders is: RMAAAAAAA - RMZZZZZZZ  (9 characters) ?

Why don't I get any warning and can create the order ?

I work on SAP ERP 6.0

entry.title: Re: Landed Cost Functionality
entry.content:
@JP,

If I got it right, you could test the following mock up:

  1. Begin with a GRPO for your item at $100.
  2. Add a Landed Cost for the standard freight cost of $20, allocating it to the “Freight” cost line.
  3. Later, the actual cost increases to $30 (an additional $10), so, set up a new Landed Cost type called “Freight Variance” and create a new Landed Cost based on the original one, and allocate the $10 to it.
  4. Finally, generate the AP Invoice for the Freight Carrier. Use the “Copy From > Landed Costs” option, which will include both the original Freight cost and the Freight Variance as services.

This process ensures traceability, as all related documents are linked and visible on the relationship map. The result will be similar to this:

entry.title: SAP CodeJam in Vienna 2024
entry.content:
Dear CodeJam Team,

the SAP Community in Vienna would like to organize a CodeJam, these are the cornerstones:
Date: 08.11.2024 (we are organizing a SIT on the day after)
Location: we have a Location that can accomodate about 25 people
Preferred Topic: ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
Contact: hello@sit.wien

We hope that's possible with your schedule and we'll be happy to hear from you.

Kind regards,
SAP Community Vienna Orga Team

entry.title: Re: Solr upgrade issue with version 8.1 to 9.2 in Commerc...
entry.content:
By mistake I have updated the version property value in hybris\bin\modules\search-and-navigation\solrserver\resources\solr\9.2\customizations/meta.properties then configurations mismatched with OOTB - solrserver.solr.customizations.versions. I rectified now, it's working fine.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Check the Availability of Your Multi-Environment HANA Cloud Instances with SAP Automation Pilot
entry.content: Great article and shared hands-on experience!

entry.title: SAP AEM requirement and guidance
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement where when ever "Material Number" is getting updated on sender system(we) then event should be sent with only "Material Number" to receiver partner system.. Then the receiver partner system makes an API call with "Material Number" value as input to us(sending system) and then as a response to that API call updated price info(plus other fields) should be sent back as API response..

In this case, Advanced Event Mesh(AEM) comes in to picture only in case of sending "Material Number" when ever there is a change right? Does sending notification event makes sense when there is only one field value to be sent to the partner system? Should we choose Notification event over data event in this case? I have experience on configuration of Queues/topics in AEM for Data event but not for notification event..  Could you please let me know if there is any difference in terms of configuration in AEM for Data Vs Notification event?

Also most importantly, should we ask receiving partner system to develop an API on their side to consume the "Material Number" value (or) should they pull and consume the data via AMQP protocol? (or) what do you propose in this scenario to establish stable interface which is cost minimal solution as well?

Regards!

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Alexander_Schaedlich , Thanks. with the above information you was able to successfully actiavte the booster - ABAP Environment in SAP BTP and connected to ADT - Ecplise. You need to generate/confiure a HTTP Services. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-ZxpAt8QgfM) 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/http-services-in-sap-btp/ba-p/13530685 

After successful service confifuration in ADT, you can able to select the services when working in BAS. 

Hope this helps. Thanks. 

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Vienna 2024
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

we are happy to announce the SAP Inside Track Vienna 2024. The event will take place on 09.11.2024. This event will be a great opportunity to join up with people of the SAP Community, whether you are a SAP User, Developer or Consultant, SAP-affiliated or not.

The Call for Speakers will open at the end of July, further details will follow.

If you have any questions, contributions or suggestions to make this a great event, please don't hesitate to contact us at hello@sit.wien

Kind regards,
sitVIE orga team

entry.title: Re: Failed to resolve endpoint: xslt://pd:HCIOWNERPID:MAP...
entry.content:
Resolution

To change the Default System ID configuration to your ERP system id, follow the steps below:

  1. Login to your SAP Business Network account as a Buyer
  2. Navigate to Administration > Configuration > Business Application IDs and End Points (cXML and OData Setup)
  3. You will see Configure Business Application IDs screen > Click in the Default System ID
  4. Rename it to your ERP System ID by changing the System ID value
  5. Click Save

In the Configuration page, click SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network:

  1. Uncheck the Enable SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network check box
  2. Click Save
  3. In the Configuration page, click SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network
  4. Check the Enable SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network check box
  5. Click Save

entry.title: Wily Introscope High availability setup
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are upgrading our Solution Manager to 7.2 SP 18, and in the process, we are also updating our CA Introscope version to 10.8.

We have setup high availability following the below procedure from Broadcom: What are the steps to implement failover and High Availability (HA) MOMs? (broadcom.com)

This is working as expected, excluding the DNS part.

However, when trying to connect the Introscope to, we are installing the DAA agent using Physical hostname of the server and the same is used when detecting the Introscope installation in Solution manager "Infrastructure configuration" step.

In the above case, please let us know how we can setup the high availability environment for CA Introscope, considering the functionality given in the link shared above.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope High availability setup
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Please follow High Availability Setup for Introscope Enterprise Manager. This documentation is available under the following link: High Availability Setup for Introscope Enterprise Manager (sap.com) 

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Restrict few SAP Fiori Notification to SAP Workzone and Mobile Devices
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have configured multiple notifications in the SAP S/4 system. This included configuring the standard notification as well as custom notification.

I have also integrated the SAP Workzone notification with the SAP Fiori Launchpad notification and configured the SAP Mobile Start to get the notification on mobile devices.

My question is how we can restrict some notifications to Fiori launchpad only and not pass that notification to SAP Workzone or mobile devices. 

Is there any way which is provided by the SAP Notification framework by which we can do this so that my sensitive notification can only be on Fiori launchpad and not move to Workzone or mobile devices?

entry.title: Terraform Provider for SAP BTP version 1.5.0 - what’s new
entry.content:
Here we go again – welcome 1.5.0

The July release aka version 1.5.0 of the Terraform provider for SAP BTP is out. Let’s look at what has been added since the last release.

Of course, you also find all the information in the release notes in the GitHub repository:

Feature: Increased timeout for resource subaccount subscription

Some users might have run into a time-out issue when provisioning a subscription on subaccount level. While this should be a rare case, we provided a quick fix and increased the default timeout for this resource to 60 minutes.

This is a temporal fix, and we will provide a timeout block for the resource in the upcoming release as you already know from environment and service instances.

Feature: Support for subaccount service broker

The new release contains a new resource as well as the corresponding data sources for service brokers on subaccount level.

You find details on how to use them in the documentation:

  • https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/subaccount_service_broker
  • https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/data-sources/subaccount_service_broker
  • https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/data-sources/subaccount_service_brokers

Feature: Resource to create roles

While the Terraform provider supported data sources for roles, you could not provision them up to now. With release 1.5.0 we provide a resource that allows you to do exactly that namely provision roles via Terraform on SAP BTP. The resource is available on global account, directory, and subaccount level.

As usual you find the details on parameters and examples in the documentation:

  • https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/globalaccount_role
  • https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/directory_role
  • https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest/docs/resources/subaccount_role

Fix: Enable creation of duplicate service instances in different environments

You might have run into an issue when trying to service instances with the same name in different environments e.g., one in Cloud Foundry and one on BTP in the runtime “other”.

In case you tried this, you have gotten an error stating “BadRequest”.

We had a small glitch in the data retrieval of the service instance resource that was fixed in this release, so this issue is gone.

Fix: Check for multiple auth parameters

Providing the authentication data for the provider can be done via variables in your configuration or via environment variables. We had some gaps comparing the checks via the provider schema and the injection via environment variables. This would have resulted in “strange” errors messages on your end that were hard to pin down.

These gaps are closed, and the validation now has you covered with meaningful error messages.

Improvement: Improved error handling for entitlement destruction

Sometimes things can go sideways when provisioning or deprovisioning your resources. In these cases, error messages that help you to find the root cause are important.

We are continually improving the provider in this area. An example scenario for this is when you try to destroy an entitlement for which a service instance exists outside of Terraform's lifecycle.

With this release we added more context to the error message that you get when deleting an entitlement that should help you in investigating the reasons for the issue.

How to update?

The update of the provider version is straightforward. Depending on your configuration in the provider, you must adjust the version constraint to 1.3.0 and execute a “terraform init -upgrade”.

That’s it.

You find the documentation of the enhanced resources in the Terraform registry: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/SAP/btp/latest

Feedback, questions, bugs, feature requests

The procedure hasn’t change: if you want to interact with us, use the GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp:

  • To file a bug, please open an issue in the repository.
  • To file a feature request, please file it in the repository.
  • If you have a question, want to discuss ideas, or do some “show & tell”, feel free to start a GitHub Discussion.

There are also some feature requests open that you can vote for. Check for the issues that are label as “enhancement” and “pending decision“ via this link https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement+label%3Apending-decision.

What is next?

Do you want a sneak peek at what is coming next and when we plan to deliver the next release? You find that information in the milestones on our GitHub repository https://github.com/SAP/terraform-provider-btp/milestones.

Be aware that plans and dates might change through the course of development.

With that … happy Terraforming!

entry.title: Santiago - SAP Stammtisch 12.8.2024 18:00 CLT #sapcodejamslatam
entry.content:
The local SAP Community in Santiago has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

SAP Stammtisch in Santiago will happen on August 12th, 2024 at 18:00 CLT for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

Let’s talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch by clicking "I will attend", we have a table reservation for 12 at the Fuente Chilena.  FYI, everyone is responsible for their own to buy a food/drink item if they wish, we are just happy for the chance to connect in person and have some relaxing conversation!

Click here to find more information about the SAP Developer Advocates South America Roadshow

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2024 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇨🇱 🇦🇷 🇨🇴 (August 8th - 21st 2024)

entry.title: Modification of standard SAP Notification
entry.content:
I have activated some of the standard notifications for workflow and purchase orders.

But I have a requirement that the notification text should be changed, and we have to disable some action buttons and have to introduce a new action button. Is there any way in the extended framework for notification by which we can enhance the standard notification?

If we have to restrict certain notifications to only get triggered for some type of business document or some purchase organization, how can we achieve this?

entry.content:
Hi Team,

While creating a notification in SAM application for all equipments we are getting the below error:

  2. Error while sending request to backend

We have recently upgraded SAP to 2023 version and the version of SAM we are using is 2110 and also we are using standard SAM client downloaded from Play store/App store.

Device : Iphone 14 pro

Model: 17.5.1(Latest)

Regards,

Preethi

The local SAP Community in Bogota has a chance to meet after our first of two local SAP CodeJams!

SAP Stammtisch in Bogota will happen on August 20th, 2024 at 18:00 COT for a few hours, so join us and be a part of our Group!  You don't have to be an attendee of our SAP CodeJam events, just someone active or curious about the SAP Community and our focus on #developers

entry.title: select where condition
entry.content:
SELECT * FROM /scwm/huhdr INTO TABLE (lt_tab) WHERE lgnum = _lgnum.
LOOP AT lt_tab INTO DATA(ls_tab).
  IF ls_tab-hu_guid_ext <> ls_tab-guid_hu_top.
    WRITE: ls_tab-huident.
  ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

 

 

 

Hi friends,

Can I add IF ls_tab-hu_guid_ext <> ls_tab-guid_hu_top ( which is in the loop ) in select where condition ?

Thanks,

Madhu M V

entry.title: Re: RFR in SAP RAR

Looks like the instructions inter-twined between action and function.

{
ID: "e373bede-7a34-467c-a988-99a0017b708d",
task: "northbreeze-selectproduct",
result: "PASS",
createdAt: "2024-07-26T11:28:27.792Z",

modifiedAt: "2024-07-26T11:28:27.792Z",
modifiedBy: "anonymous",
serviceurl: "https://northbreeze-main.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/northbreeze",
communityid: "cguttikonda24"
},

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA DATABASE - SYSTEM USER - Best practices says to deactivate SYSTEM ID
entry.content:
Hello,

it depends on your business scenario. this is the same discussion like with SAP* user in 000 client. System user is only used for maintenance tasks (update e.g.) , for regular tasks you can create dedicated user for your admins with necessary roles (copy system user e.g. )

br

entry.title: Re: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content: I achieved it by BDC record and using a function with the IN BACKGROUND TASK DESTINATION 'NONE' statement.

entry.title: Re: Fiori My Paystubs V3 download button not displaying on Android devices
entry.content: I was told by SAP support that the download button only shows for iPhone (iOS).

How do i connect and if there is any drivers for specific postgresSQL  to install,

please share me needed details.

Thanks in advance.

Regards

Mani

entry.title: Re: sap certification for disclosure management (DM) and...
entry.content: Hello @AndersonCM , SAP Disclosure Management questions used to be embedded into SAP Financial Consolidation certification, but it was discontinued some years ago.

entry.title: Pack existing HU into another existing HU both assigned to Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I have this requirement to pack an existing HU into another HU through abap code.

My scenario:

I have 2 HUs, one of them has a material assigned and the other one is just an empty HU.

I need to pack the first one and it's content into the second one.

Im trying to achieve this this way:

1- In a Z program I create the new empty HU.

2- Assign it to the Outbout Delivery

3- Once assigned, I use the BAPI_HU_PACK to pack the first one (with the material) into the second one (empty) so I can have 3 levels -> Top Hu (ump), Second HU (ump working as a box) and it's material.

When I execute the BAPI_HU_PACK I get this error HUFUNCTIONS 261 'Processing of HUs for selected objects not possible'

I think it's because once the HU is assigned to the Outbound Delivery you cant 'repack' it into another HU but if you do so manually, there's no problem.

Any idea?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM
entry.content: Hi Erik,

entry.title: Am I alone in Datasphere usability problems?
entry.content:
I am frequently running into the following problems in terms of usability with Datasphere:

1) Slowness of the interface

The workflow Save -> Data preview -> implement -> jump to Data Builder is slow to the point where I find myself looking to do other things between clicks. I know it is Cloud but it is slow compared to other cloud products too. And there is a big difference between a 2 second wait or a 5+ second wait between clicks.

2) Different state of views / problematic caching

It happens constantly that a change in an underlying view / table is not reflected in views / models on top. I find myself constantly reloading the tab, reimplementing or even closing the tab and reopening it. I find myself second guessing if I made a mistake after all until after the third reload or so, the change is finally there. This eats up a lot of time. And you simply do not know if the current view you are working in has up to date info from underlying view or not.

3) Things like sorting and filtering and level of navigation are not remembered.

I always want to filter by last change. I always want to hide shared objects. But I always have to change those settings. When I'm working in a folder, I want to stay in that folder but I am always dropped back to the root folder. These are just a few examples where I have to redo the same settings over and over.

4) Poor error messages

Error messages are essential for finding mistakes but often times Datasphere error messages are cryptic or even misleading. 

All of these issues combined cause an immense slowdown in my workflow that stands in the way to really make Datasphere shine for me. I personally would advice the management to prioritise usability features as they are needed. 

Am I alone here or do others experience the same issues?

entry.title: Re: TGM-17104 Goal Status Trigger Completion Setting?
entry.content: I came here to find the answer as well. Statuses like In Progress, Behind should show on the homepage with the Mark As Complete button. Statuses like Cancelled and Postponed should not show on the homepage as "Mark as Complete" There needs to be an extra layer of rules where you can pick which ones trigger an overdue on the homepage, and which ones dont.

entry.title: Re: select where condition
entry.content:
Hello @Madhusudhan_MV 

Here the select statement you can use:

SELECT * FROM /scwm/huhdr INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_tab)
  WHERE lgnum = @pa_lgnum
  AND hu_guid_ext <> /scwm/huhdr~guid_hu_top.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Publication of SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 and more...
entry.content:
We successfully launched content updates for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 in EARL this week. These are now readily available to our customer channels Digital Discovery Assessment, Cloud ALM, and Process Navigator. Besides, the process updates for the following have also been deployed:

  • SAP Best Practices for SAP Marketing Cloud 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud for public sector 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for Analytics with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
  • SAP Best Practices for Analytics with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023

With the new Process Navigator version, we also provide new additional filters to find all Two-Tier related solution processes. 

Figure 1: Filter for Two-Tier ERP to find the respective solution processes.

In conjunction with content updates, we introduced again several new features to Process Navigator on SAP for Me, based on feedback from our customers, partners, and internal users.

Following new features are available: 

  • Enable comparison for solution scenarios and for processes of different release versions or different localizations 
  • Show applications and application roles for solution activities in solution process flow diagrams 
  • Enable mass assets download for selected solution processes 
  • Show the total number of solution processes, new solution processes, and number of solution processes flow diagrams for a solution scenario 
  • Filter solution processes by application, application roles, solution capabilities and solution components on global search page 

Figure 2: Compare functionality on solution scenario level with other country/region or other version.

By using the comparison function to compare two release versions, you can easily identify the changes that have been made. The changes are displayed in color and provide a great opportunity for side-by-side comparison in the split view.

Figure 3: Compare result page in a side-by-side view pointing out all changes.

In addition to the current filters for solution scenario version and country/region, new filtering options have been introduced. Users can now apply filters for application, application role, and capability as well. 

Figure 4: Filter for application, application role and capability.

Furthermore, we provide new personalization features in Process Navigator:

  • Enable tile sequence personalization on the homepage
  • Enable tab sequence personalization on the scenario and process detail page
  • Preferred country/region as the default filter for global search results
  • Notification about new features

Figure 5: Personalization options on the page, and the user default settings.

The personalization feature lets users customize the Process Navigator view according to their own needs, considering each user's distinct characteristics and behaviors. Keep an eye out for upcoming updates on personalization and continuous enhancements to usability. 

In the last quarter, the Process Navigator saw over 4,000,000 visits indicating a high demand for SAP Best Practices. This motivates our team to keep improving the tool, adding valuable information, and prioritizing user-friendliness. 

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment in our Feedback Service tool or ask your questions and engage with the experts.

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Hello Eva_Hett , 

Thank you for the warm welcome! I’m excited to start the "Modernizing Integration with SAP Integration Suite" course on August 28, 2024. The topics covered, including AI-driven integration, ISA-M methodology, and real-time insights with event-driven architectures, are incredibly relevant and intriguing.

I look forward to engaging in the Course Discussion Group and exchanging ideas with fellow learners. I'm eager to deepen my understanding and apply these insights to enhance our integration strategies.

Thanks again for this opportunity, and I’m excited to get started!

Best regards,
Azmath.

I have a Bachelor's degree in commerce.I'm first generation college graduate in my family.
I'm interested in SAP FICO as it would help me in enhancing my skill and get a certification so that I can land a great job in finance.

I hope you would consider this, thanks in advance

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Re: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM
entry.content: Do you know an OSS Note which match with this problem? Do you know a function / possibility where I can delete all uncessary multiple freight settlements in 1 time? Thanks a lot and BR, Chris

entry.title: Customizing Your Form Template With Custom FormCalc/JS Code(using Abode LifeCycle) in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Previously, the tutorial of customizing output form template using Adobe LifceCycle are mainly focused on tasks like adding custom fields, changing company logo, changing address layout. I strongly recommend to read this very nicely blog which showing everything step by step to customize output form template. While Adobe Forms also support programming to add logic for data source processing, this blog would like to give a short glimpse on how to write FormCalc code to change the behavior of your Form Template.

This blog would split into 2 parts where the first part would introduce the composition of Abode LifeCycle and how to use the code editor. The second part would introduce the syntax of FormCalc with a customizing example. In the following phase, the term “Designer” would refer to Adobe LifeCycle Designer.

 1.Designer in the SAP environment.                                          

 

  • A. Layout Editor

    The Layout Editor is the main area where you create and maintain the form design. It contains four tabs: "Design View", "Master Page", "XML Source", "Preview Tab".

    "Design View" tab Displays the pages that make up the form design. The pages in Design View contain a form design’s content. In #S/4HANA Cloud Output, we don't need to create any new form template cause we have the pre-delivered output template. What you need to do is just to adjust the template. Secondly, "Master Pages" tab displays the master pages that can be applied to pages in Design View. Master pages specify the layout and the background for the form design. You add objects that will occur in the same position throughout the form design on a master page. The Master Pages tab is hidden by default. Objects in the Design View page do not appear in the master page. "XML Source" tab displays the XML source code that describes the structure of the form design and its objects. It is recommended that you do not edit the XML source code directly. Preview PDF tab Displays a PDF form based on the current form design. As you work, if you have Acrobat or Adobe Reader installed, you can preview the form in the Preview PDF tab. Use the Preview PDF tab to view and test the operation of a form or template as if it were a PDF file. You can set options for previewing interactive forms or printable forms in PDF by using the Form Properties dialog box (Preview tab).                                                                     

  • B. Script Editor           

 In the Script Editor, you can create, edit, and review calculations and scripts specific to a form. This tool allows you to develop anything from basic calculations that sum numeric fields to intricate scripts that dynamically adjust the form's layout based on user interactions. Designer provides support for scripting in its proprietary language, FormCalc, as well as in JavaScript, offering flexibility to cater to different scripting requirements.

  • C. Palette                                                                                                                                                     

The palettes offer convenient access to tools without cluttering your workspace. They can consist of multiple tabs, each housing common properties. For instance, the Object palette may feature several tabs. You have the flexibility to organize the palettes within the workspace to align with your preferred working style. Among the most frequently utilized palettes are the Hierarchy palette and Data View palette.

The Hierarchy palette visually represents the contents found in the Design View and Master Pages tabs. Selecting an item in the Hierarchy palette also highlights it in the associated body or master page.

Regarding the Data View palette, when a data connection is present, it showcases the hierarchy derived from that connection. The top nodes in this hierarchy represent individual data connections by displaying their names. Data connections establish a link between the form and the data source. When designing a form based on a data connection, Designer constructs a data structure for the form using the provided data source. Users can filter nodes for manipulation and efficiently create a form using selected or all data sources. Subsequently, binding is utilized to connect a node from the data source to an object on the form

2. Customizing Example

Requirement: You are an SAP implementation consultant for a consulting services company. The consulting services company has a long-term contract with their customer and has created a continuous multi-year Service Sales Order in the SAP system. Every year-end, one single item was added to the sales order. Due to business specifics, the consulting company wants to send only the Order Confirmation Change for the last item added that year which means to only print the last item in the PDF output.

Implementation Steps:

Find the code editor area.

When first received this requirement, the most important point is to find out the working mechanism for Adobe Designer. In a nutshell, the goal is to display the data source in a formatted manner. We can write logic to customizing how data was shown. In the script editor, Designer offers various trigger points for the script, such as 'initialize,' 'enter,' 'exit,' and so on. If the form connected to a data source, we can manipulate the data directly.

Click on the Hierarchy palette, select the node "tabInnerTable" located at the following path: Form -> bdyMain -> frmTableBlock -> tblRemarkRowTable -> rowItem -> tabInnerTable.

 

Then open the Script Editor(click Window tab and choose Script Editor) for the chosen node. Choose the dropdown list with “calculate*”. Add the below code to control that only show the last item:

 

 

var tblrow = frmTableBlock.tblRemarkRowTable.resolveNodes("rowItem[*]").length - 1;

if ( $.parent.parent.rowItem[tblrow].tblInnerTable.rowItem.colItem.rawValue <> $.rowItem.colItem.rawValue )

     then

       $.presence = "inactive"

endif;

 

 

When calculate the each row item's value: Get the last row's index in the data source table(rowItem) first. Then compare the value in current row with the value in the last item through the gotten last item's index. If they are different which means current row item are not the last item, set the presence of current row as inactive. With this code, only the last item will be shown in the PDF.

Thanks for reading this blog…

  • Hope this blog will be useful. If you enjoyed this blog post please give it a like! If you have questions, feel free to comment.
  • This article is an example of customizing a form template using a script, with the hope that it can help everyone understand how to customize their own forms in a more diverse and effective way to achieve additional functionalities.

Additional Note.

Please check community tag(Link) for other knowledges about S/4HANA Cloud for Sales. You can also post and answer questions here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit - Direct Transfer - BOMs with History with effectivity parameter
entry.content:
Dear community,

We're currently migration BOMs from ECC to S/4 HANA and we're facing the following challenge for lots of BOMs. The method CNV_PE_S4_PP_MATERIAL_BOM_ECN doesn't consider changes in positions with ECN numbers with effectivity parameters. These positions are migrated but as new positions instead of as modifications of the same position.

In the source system

In the target system.

entry.title: Re: Disabling Dropdown Menu Options in BRFplus Workbench

entry.title: Delivery already contained in shipment, deletion of the outbound delivery impossible
entry.content:
Dear all,

The process is following:

First we delete the freight order: FO 6100022255 duly canceled.

After that we can see in our document flow of the outbound delivery that the freight order disappears:

But if we now want delete the delivery an error message is visible:

Delivery already contained in a shipment

Cancelling is impossible

 

After saving the delivery = automatic creation of a new Freight order = 6100022305

 

How is it possible to solve this problem? We want delete the delivery. But if we delete the freight order and afterwards we save the outbound delivery, suddenly a new freight is created.

Very best regards

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever

Hi there - you say: "i have tested in my local works well" but actually it's not producing what the task requirements state ... so of course, when you submit it to the TESTER, local or deployed, the TESTER is going to mark it as failed 🙂 

You might want to re-read the requirements 😉

entry.title: Re: difference between logical spool server and alternative printer

entry.title: Re: Am I alone in Datasphere usability problems?
entry.content: You are not alone. It gets better over time. If you had been there at the beginning, you would appreciate the current state more 😁

entry.title: Re: Landed Cost Functionality
entry.content:
Hi,

Answer to your query of adjusting the difference between estimated and actual landed cost expense head: - 

Create a GRIR - CHA Charges In Liability Drawer Same As GRNI GL

Map this to landed cost set up. In landed cost JE this GL will get credited. When you book the broker invoice of type service against landed cost above GL will get debited.

In case of difference, you can set this difference through GL reconciliation via a manual JE by selecting the GL of your choice.

Hope this will help you.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever

entry.title: Intermittent Dashboard Functionality Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community  Team

I am writing to report an issue we are experiencing with our dashboard. we have encountered intermittent functionality problems under the following conditions:

Our dashboard is experiencing intermittent functionality issues. Specifically, the dashboard fails to display information in numerical form (Tooltip) when hovering the cursor over it. This issue temporarily resolves after locking and unlocking the screen, but it reoccurs after some time. We need a thorough investigation and a permanent fix for this inconsistent behaviour. I have attached a screenshot  demonstrating this behaviour for your reference.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: WTax Non-Subject Amount in Invoice Sap Business One
entry.content: There is a field called WTax Liable. I searched for the fields mentioned by you. Could not locate.

entry.title: The ‘Ahhh… Access’ Moment: How a Simple Connection Changed My Interview Fate
entry.content:
It was a sunny afternoon, and I sat across from the technical manager, nerves tingling. The job interview had been intense—questions about my experience, technical prowess, and problem-solving abilities. But sometimes, it’s the unexpected moments that leave a lasting mark.

As the manager described their vision for a new application—Microsoft Visual BASIC and Access—I listened intently. The room buzzed with excitement. Finally, there was a pause, and my instincts kicked in.

“Ahhh… Access,” I said, almost involuntarily.

The manager’s eyes widened. “You know Access?” he asked, enthusiasm bubbling.

And just like that, the tide turned. Suddenly, I was the candidate they sought—the one who understood Access intricacies. The interview shifted from grilling to camaraderie.

In the end, it wasn’t a complex algorithm or a dazzling code snippet that sealed the deal. It was a shared moment, a connection forged over a database tool.

Years later, my friends still chuckle when I recount the “Ahhh… Access” story. It reminds me that interviews aren’t just about skills; they’re about being present, authentic, and open to unexpected bridges.

So, here’s to the power of a simple phrase—a bridge that led to a job offer and a memorable tale.

entry.title: Reassigning Same Curricula within Expiry Period to Users
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I hope this post finds you well. I am seeking guidance on reassigning the same curricula to users within the expiry period.

Scenario:

We have assigned a curricula to a group of users, and now we need to reassign the same curricula to the same users within the expiry period. The curricula has not changed, but we need to update the assignment to reflect the current dates.

Question:

Is it possible to reassign the same curricula to the same users within the expiry period without creating a new assignment or version of the curricula? If so, what are the steps to follow?

Any guidance or advice would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
I can confirm: there _are_ a lot of people with big brains in the CAP team 🙂

On "kudos", that's right. Unfortunately (and much to the annoyance of my pedantic side (of which I'm very proud)), "kudo" (no "s") is not a word, Kudos is a mass noun and cannot be subdivided, i.e. the "s" doesn't denote plural, and by inference any lack of "s" doesn't denote singular, and it makes me sad every time I see it 🙂

entry.title: Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema'
entry.content:
Hello,

          I am new to CPI, I was trying to test "Request Reply" step. It is throwing an error in "Processing" when I try to add "Step 2" I get an error "Invalid or missing namespace for 'Schema." .

I don't have those many steps as in the below screen shot, I am trying to connect to Northwind using the ODATA adapter. I have filled in all mandatory details, I don't understand why it keeps giving me that error and what information is missing.

entry.title: Costs not getting updated in PPM item financials
entry.content:
Dear experts need your help.

We have scenario PPM item -->PPM project-->PS project.

All object linking settings are completed and we can see costs getting reflected at accounting tab of ppm project.

However issue is when we are trying rpm fin02 or int planning program to roll up costs to item then costs are not showing up on item fin views.

We observed below 

1. Program output shows no link exists message for ppm item project management 

2. Ps project is not automatically assigned in object links

Later once we manually assigns ps project in object links and execute program costs reflect on item fin views correctly.

We are on S4 2021version.

Please suggest how we can automatically assign ps project in above scenario or any additional settings required in global fields or something

entry.title: Convite Especial para o 15º SAP Inside Track São Paulo #SITSP2024
entry.content:
Olá, amigos e amigas!

É com alegria que anunciamos que amanhã, sábado, dia 27 de julho, acontece o nosso tão aguardado 15º SAP Inside Track São Paulo! Após meses de planejamento e expectativas, estamos prontos para receber você em um novo local, atendendo aos pedidos da nossa comunidade por um espaço maior.

Agradecemos imensamente à SAP Brasil por todo o suporte e incentivo ao longo dos anos, sempre oferecendo estrutura, patrocínio e conhecimento para nossa comunidade. Este ano, temos a honra de contar com a Universidade PUC São Paulo como nossa nova anfitriã, recebendo quase 300 participantes confirmados.

Lembramos que as inscrições pagas serão doadas para instituições carentes. Isso foi graças ao apoio de todos os envolvidos, desde organizadores, participantes, palestrantes e patrocinadores. A sua participação contribui para uma boa causa e faz parte desta grande ação solidária!

Estamos ansiosos para compartilhar momentos incríveis com vocês. Prepare-se para um dia repleto de conhecimento, networking e colaboração!

➤ Como fazer para acompanhar tudo?

Sigam aqui os links:

Transmissão ao vivo pelo youtube:

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLavVF5azjc7lW4qloFXvugDvVHPhLvVwj

Interação em tempo real pelo linkedin pelas contas:

SIT Brasil

https://www.linkedin.com/in/sitbrazil/

SIT São Paulo

https://www.linkedin.com/in/sap-inside-track-s%C3%A3o-paulo-a43b99305/

Hashtag #SITSP2024

https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=sitsp2024

➤ Também não deixe de seguir o grupo oficial da Comunidade SAP em São Paulo

https://community.sap.com/t5/s%C3%A3o-paulo/gh-p/saopaulo

Abraço a todos e tenham um grande dia em Comunidade!

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Thanks, yes, sorry for the confusion. Definitely should be an action. Corrected.

entry.title: Re: In table PA_VLE_ENROLL_SEAT there is a field ATTENDANCE_DURATION. need to know the measure of it
entry.content:
Hello,

The data is stored in seconds.

Regards,
Chris

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Lovely! You say all the right things to pique my interest! Would love to see some example from you here!

In wanting to generate some sample tests to use in the TESTER module for this, I generated stuff with jq, "because jq". And you wouldn't believe how lovely this was - it just flowed from my keyboard, and was instantly beautiful. Not because of my coding prowess, but because of how jq has been designed. See the `getid` function here:

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Nice work, and sorry about the confusion. 

You ask a good question - I'm not sure how this might work (altho I have a small brain) because we have to know the number of products in order to calculate the index, via the modulo of that number before diving in with that calculated index. That said, I'd love to hear from others who have other ideas!

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to...
entry.content: Thank you Database up gradation is complete
